items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a steady heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Perform 5 x 800m intervals at a pace of 5:30 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 4 (160-175 bpm) during the intervals.

items.title: Easy Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a relaxed pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (below 130 bpm) to aid recovery.

items.title: Weight Training Session
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, lunges, and deadlifts, with 1-2 minutes of rest between sets. Aim for a heart rate around 120 bpm during the workout.
